title: We're Live at FWD>>>FEST 26
body:
FWD>>>FEST 26 is on right now across the Sunshine Coast, running 19 to 21 May at The Wharf Mooloolaba and Altitude Nine in Maroochydore. The Sunshine Coast Innovation Portal is being showcased today at the FWD>SHOWCASE as part of the Ecosystem Showcase, where founders, investors, researchers and government are gathering to connect and move the region forward.

The portal is a live prototype built to make the Sunshine Coast innovation ecosystem visible and accessible. If you're at the event today, find us at the showcase floor and get your business listed.
